query:
UPDATE project_cash_flow_settings 
SET funding_source = 'escrow' 
WHERE section = 'offplan' 
AND item_key IN (
  'developer_fee_offplan',
  'fraz_fee',
  'rera_registration',
  'rera_units',
  'noc_fee',
  'escrow_fee',
  'community_fee',
  'marketing_offplan',
  'escrow_deposit'
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute UPDATE project_cash_flow_settings
